Uses of Package
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.tieback.capacity

Packages that use neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.tieback.capacity
Package
Description
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.tieback.capacity
Host tie-in capacity planning, holdback allocation, process-model checks, and debottleneck decision support for field-development studies.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.tieback.capacity used by neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.tieback.capacity
    Class
    Description
    CapacityAllocationPolicy
    Allocation policy used when host capacity is insufficient for base and satellite production.
    DebottleneckDecision
    Simple debottleneck investment decision derived from a tie-in capacity study.
    HoldbackPolicy
    Policy for handling satellite production that cannot pass through the host in a period.
    HostTieInPoint
    Mapping between production-profile rates and an attached host process model stream.
    ProductionLoad
    Immutable production load for one planning period in a host tie-in study.
    ProductionProfileSeries
    Ordered production profile for host base production or satellite production.
    TieInCapacityPlanner
    Time-series host tie-in planner for capacity allocation, satellite holdback, process-model checks, and debottleneck recommendations.
    TieInCapacityPlanner.AllocationResult
    Nameplate allocation result.
    TieInCapacityPlanner.ProcessAdjustedAllocation
    Process-adjusted allocation result.
    TieInCapacityPlanner.ProcessOutcome
    Process-model capacity outcome.
    TieInCapacityResult
    Aggregated result from a host tie-in capacity and holdback study.
    TieInPeriodResult
    Capacity, holdback, and bottleneck result for one host tie-in planning period.
